title: HumanApprovalEvent
description: Typed escalation payload (Constitution Principle VI) that authorizes the plan -> execute transition. The transition is accepted iff plan_hash matches the sha256 of the on-disk plan markdown at transition time.

approved_by.description: Attributable identifier of the human approver (FR-005).

plan_hash.description: sha256 hex digest of the rendered plan markdown the human reviewed (D-003). Mismatch at transition time refuses the transition.

approval_note.description: Free-form note. Setting this to 'revoked' signals a revocation (spec edge case).
